title: Refactor Conversation Log to Render Chronological Collapsible Bubbles and Fix Syntax Highlighting
description: Refactor the conversation display logic in MainActivity.java to: 1. Remove the combined 'thoughts [x], tool calls [x]' grouping logic. 2. Display all non-user/non-agent messages (thoughts, tool calls, tool results, etc.) in chronological order inside their own individual collapsible chat bubbles. 3. Keep all non-user/non-agent bubbles collapsed by default. 4. If 'Expand All' is not toggled, clicking a collapsed bubble should expand it and collapse all other non-user/non-agent bubbles (only 1 open at a time). 5. If 'Expand All' is toggled, all bubbles expand/collapse together. 6. Fix syntax highlighting by removing the outer font color override (#A0E6FF) in renderAndHighlightCodeBlock and/or renderPlainMonospace so Dracula-style keyword/comment/string styling is visible.
result: Refactored conversation display to render thoughts, tool calls, and tool results individually and chronologically in collapsible bubbles. Implemented one-at-a-time expansion and restored Dracula syntax highlighting colors.
